violations.description: Preventing contamination by employees. — --Employee observed using same pair of single-use gloves for more than one task. Observed food employee answer his phone while wearing gloves, but did not change them before continuing food preparations. Gloves should be changed after handling items not necessary for food preparation.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. Hood ventilation filters were found dirty during inspection. These should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. Clean spoons were found stored in a dirty container on top of the microwave. Clean equipment should be stored in a clean location.
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
